title: Databricks Runtime 18 and Databricks Runtime 18 for Machine Learning have transitioned to LTS
body:
With the general availability of Databricks Runtime 19, Databricks Runtime 18 and Databricks Runtime 18 for Machine Learning have transitioned to long-term support (LTS). LTS versions receive three years of stability and security fixes.

For release notes, see [Databricks Runtime 18 LTS](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/18) and [Databricks Runtime 18 LTS for Machine Learning](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/18ml). For lifecycle details, see [Databricks Runtime support lifecycles](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/databricks-runtime-ver#runtime).

ref_links.text: Databricks Runtime 18 LTS for Machine Learning
